title: Password confirmation with virtual field
prompt: Add password confirmation to MyApp.Accounts.User. Declare `:password` and `:password_confirmation` as virtual fields, then use `validate_confirmation(:password)` in the changeset. (Virtual fields live on the struct but are not persisted.) Write the full schema to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Canonical virtual+confirmation pair. Easy but catches the common failure of declaring password_confirmation without the virtual flag.
